action.reasoning: Observation: Ensemble of 5 models achieves val AUC 0.7503 (up from 0.7491 best single). Iteration took 166s but completed successfully. Remaining time ~18 min. Analysis: Ensemble improves over single model. Need to submit eval for current ensemble and then try to improve further. Key improvements: (1) weighted ensemble using val AUC as weights, (2) more diverse models, (3) DKVMN architecture for diversity. Decision: Submit eval for current ensemble, then train additional diverse models and implement weighted averaging.
